svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="EOArkDd7oR7zL_7JlFB5"> <mxGraphModel dx="1030" dy="578" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "flowchart TD
 Browser[\"🌐 Navegador (React 19 + Inertia)\"]
 Presentation[\"📦 Presentación\nControllers · Requests · Resources\nInertia Pages · React Components\"]
 Application[\"⚙️ Aplicación\nCommandBus · QueryBus · EventBus\nCommands · Queries · Handlers · DTOs\"]
 Domain[\"🏛️ Dominio\nAggregates · Value Objects\nDomain Events · Contracts\"]
 Infrastructure[\"🔧 Infraestructura\nEloquent Repositories · Query Executors\nLaravel Services · Buses · Generators\"]
 DB[(\"🗄️ MariaDB\")]
 Redis[(\"⚡ Redis\")]
 Storage[(\"📁 Storage\")]

 Browser <-->|\"Inertia / Axios / React Query\"| Presentation
 Presentation -->|\"CommandBus.dispatch()\"| Application
 Presentation -->|\"QueryBus.dispatch()\"| Application
 Application -->|\"Aggregate.create() / reconstitute()\"| Domain
 Domain -->|\"Contracts (interfaces)\"| Infrastructure
 Application -->|\"EventBus.publish()\"| Infrastructure
 Infrastructure --> DB
 Infrastructure --> Redis
 Infrastructure --> Storage",
 "config": null
